No Poverty.reason: The course syllabus provides no evidence, explicit or inferred, that directly or indirectly relates to the eradication of poverty or its various dimensions.

Zero Hunger.reason: There is no information in the course description or learning outcomes that pertains to hunger, food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course content, focusing on cultural images and stereotypes, does not include any elements related to health, well-being, disease prevention, or healthcare access.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No aspect of the course, such as its objectives or content, relates to water resources, sanitation, hygiene, or water quality management.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course syllabus contains no information or learning outcomes related to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course focuses on cultural images and historical analysis, with no direct or indirect links to employment, economic growth, or labor rights.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course content does not involve infrastructure development, industrialization, technological innovation, or scientific research in these areas.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The syllabus does not contain any elements related to urban planning, sustainable settlements, cultural heritage protection within communities, or disaster resilience.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course content does not address sustainable consumption patterns, resource efficiency, waste reduction, or corporate sustainability practices.

Climate Action.reason: There is no mention of climate change, environmental hazards, mitigation, adaptation, or related policies within the course description.

Life Below Water.reason: The course content is entirely unrelated to marine ecosystems, ocean health, sustainable fisheries, or marine pollution.

Life on Land.reason: The syllabus provides no evidence connecting the course to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, deforestation, land degradation, or wildlife protection.
